global.description: The ad features a modern design with abstract shapes and clear promotional messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting the BingeLayer service with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract geometric shapes in the background, creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: central graphic
elements.description: A large, prominent circular shape in the center, surrounded by other geometric forms.

elements.label: rectangular graphic
elements.description: A rectangular shape positioned slightly lower than the circular graphic, adding depth to the composition.

elements.label: small shape
elements.description: A small, elongated shape located at the top left, contributing to the abstract theme.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: An unclear shape that appears to be a smaller graphic element, positioned centrally.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The text 'BingeLayer' in a bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: promotional message
elements.description: The text 'A new season drops Start free today' in a clear, inviting font, centered at the bottom.
elements.text_content: A new season drops Start free today

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' in a contrasting color, encouraging user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main subject graphics in the center, and the body text and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BingeLayer, A new season drops, Start free today, Shop now
